'''Quatrain Pudundruh''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] businessman from [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. He managed the dancing duo of [[Amaiza Foxtrain/Legends|Amaiza]] and [[Jodelle Foxtrain]] for a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before selling them into [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] to recover lost assets.
